free_text: Gamma-spectra and cross sections of the reactions
RIng-shaped samples were used(inner and outer diameters
5.5 cm and 10.5 cm,height 2.5 cm).For powders the same
containers made from plexiglas were used
and energy resolution 6 keV (for photo-peak of Cs-137).
Gamma-emission of Ra-226 was used for graduation of the
spectrometer, data from Walford G.,Doust C.E.,Nucl.Inst
Long counter for neutron flux determination
the inelastic excitation of a discrete level 846 keV,
data from Bull.Centra po Jadernym Dannym,Obninsk,ICD-3,
All data were measured as regards to the angle of 90
Free text was corrected to be human-readable.
Attenuation of neutron and gamma fluxes in samples,
multiple scattering of neutrons and background peaks
Gamma-rays energy error was less than 1 keV
